description_long: This object is a rectangular bar of soap with a vintage-style paper wrapper featuring the brand name 'VALIO' in bold letters, surrounded by red and black graphics. The front face displays additional Finnish text and a set of five interlocking rings, reminiscent of Olympic iconography. The sides and back of the soap are covered in a faded, greenish-brown paper, showing signs of age and wear. The top and bottom surfaces are similarly wrapped, with the top showing some discoloration and the bottom appearing more uniformly green. The overall appearance suggests an old-fashioned, possibly collectible soap bar, with a sturdy, compact form and a slightly rough, matte finish to the paper wrapper.
description: A vintage rectangular bar of soap wrapped in a worn, greenish-brown paper with bold 'VALIO' branding and red-black graphics on the front.
description_view_0: The front view shows the 'VALIO' brand name, red and black graphics, and Finnish text, making it the most visually detailed side.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, faded greenish-brown paper surface with no visible text or graphics.
description_view_2: The back view displays a large, uninterrupted greenish-brown paper area, showing the most wear and no branding.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, with a plain, faded greenish-brown paper surface and no visible markings.
attribute_packaging_design: Rectangular bar wrapped in vintage-style, faded greenish-brown paper with bold red and black graphics and prominent 'VALIO' branding on the front. The design features additional Finnish text and Olympic-style rings.
